results.title: Centre forms high-level committee on demographic change
results.description: Illegal immigration: Amit Shah announced a high level panel to study demographic changes linked to illegal immigrants and other unnatural factors. Retired Justice Prakash Naolekar will head the committee formed by the Home Ministry on Tuesday.

results.title: Vijay writes to PM Modi seeking rejection of Karnataka’s Mekedatu dam project

Joseph Vijay, on Monday, wrote to Prime Minister Narendra Modi, urging the Union government to reject Karnataka’s proposed Mekedatu reservoir project across the Cauvery river, stating... results.title: HM Amit Shah announces Justice Naolekar panel to address unnatural demographic change (Ld)
results.description: New Delhi, May 26 (SocialNews.XYZ) Reiterating the national security threat from unnatural demographic change, Union Home Minister Amit Shah on Tuesday announced the constitution of a five-member committee led by retired Justice Prakash Prabhakar Naolekar... The post HM Amit Shah announces Justice Naolekar panel to address unnatural demographic change (Ld) appeared first on Social News XYZ .
